author: gwhitfield
body: This reads well, Juan. I added a line about looping me in when a student misses two Thursdays.

author: juan
body: Added two more short titles that a student finished last month and wanted more of.

author: rmarsden
body: Shadowed my first desk shift Tuesday — the checklist matched what I saw. Thank you.

author: juan
body: Noted the out-of-order card step — station 4 has been slow to wake up again.

author: dcallahan
body: Happy to run the welcome table for the next talk. Put me down for it.
